name: service-interface-pattern
description: Service interfaces (IAuthService) are defined in types.ts with pure interfaces, no runtime imports. Enables mock and real implementations to be swapped via environment injection.
relevantCode: export interface IAuthService { signUp, signIn, signOut, getSession, onAuthStateChange }
recommendation: Define ITeamsService interface with CRUD methods for Org, Team, Membership, Invitation entities
